From silicon vendor to system maker, AMI’s focus is on defragmentation of a multitude of boot and BMC open-source components into one clean, coherent code tree that you can trust.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Standardization” image=”https://www.ami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/ballot-check-sharp-light-full.svg” icon_placement=”left” image_icon_width=”50px” content_max_width=”100%” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”|600|||||||” body_line_height=”1.4em” global_colors_info=”{}”]

global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″]AMI is a driving force in transforming the firmware ecosystem, embracing open architecture, open standards and open-source solutions to meet the evolving Unlock innovation, transparency and security with AMI’s open-source Community Edition series of firmware solutions. Vendor-agnostic abstractions and modular packages enable rapid adaptation, porting and integration for diverse platforms. AMI works closely with silicon providers, ODMs and OEMs to deliver our open firmware solutions, contributing additional value-added features and security enhancements.

Collaborate with Us to Build Your Open-Source Stack

Ready to get started on your open-source development journey? We invite you to explore our open-source repositories, browse the OCP marketplace for AMI solutions or contact us for support and collaboration opportunities.

excerpt.rendered: One Codebase.One Core Architecture.One Developer Experience.From silicon vendor to system maker, AMI’s focus is on defragmentation of a multitude of boot and BMC open-source components into one clean, coherent code tree that you can trust.AMI is an active member of major open standards bodies and actively drives the formation, adoption and implementation of boot, management […]
